title: Delete multiple attachments
excerpt: I’ve got an attachments column… is there an easy way of deleting all the attachments on several jobs in one go? I don’t want to delete the info from anything else on these jobs, just the attachments.

posts.author: Tracy (Tracy Emma Pontin)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve got an attachments column… is there an easy way of deleting all the attachments on several jobs in one go? I don’t want to delete the info from anything else on these jobs, just the attachments.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tracy,

Thanks for your question

I am afraid at this time the files column is excluded from our batch actions capabilities, I do apologize for the inconvenience here! Whilst I recognize this is not ideal for you, you will need to continue deleting those attachments individually - we will certainly ensure this feedback is shared with our product team. Thank you in advance for your understanding!

Warmly,
Bianca
